title: Product Hero Prompt
description: A compact prompt pattern for crisp product hero imagery with a clear subject, material cues, and lighting intent.

cards.label: Intent
cards.body: Create a single-object product scene that reads instantly in a square feed.

cards.label: Prompt Shape
cards.body: Subject, material, surface, lighting, lens, color restraint, negative space.

cards.label: Use Case
cards.body: Landing page hero images, launch posts, and visual exploration boards.

title: Material Surface Cue
description: A visual recipe for making generated products feel tactile through surface texture and edge detail.

cards.label: Focus
cards.body: Use one dominant material and one secondary surface to avoid visual noise.

cards.label: Detail
cards.body: Name the edge finish, reflection type, and surface imperfections explicitly.

cards.label: Constraint
cards.body: Keep the environment simple so the material language carries the image.

title: Shot Grammar: Overhead Flatlay
description: A structured card for arranging objects in a top-down composition with readable spacing.

cards.label: Frame
cards.body: Shoot directly downward with clear margins and a primary object cluster.

cards.label: Rhythm
cards.body: Repeat small shapes, then interrupt the pattern with one anchor object.

cards.label: Best For
cards.body: Toolkits, ingredient sets, process diagrams, and visual inventories.

title: Shot Grammar: Editorial Close-Up
description: A square-format card pattern for intimate product and lifestyle details.

cards.label: Distance
cards.body: Move close enough that texture becomes information, not decoration.

cards.label: Depth
cards.body: Use a soft background plane and a sharp foreground edge.

cards.label: Feeling
cards.body: The result should feel observed, not staged.

title: Color System: Quiet Contrast
description: A palette card for building calm pages that still separate foreground, metadata, and action.

cards.label: Base
cards.body: Warm white surface, ink text, one muted accent, and thin neutral borders.

cards.label: Signal
cards.body: Reserve saturated color for active filters, codes, and interactive states.

cards.label: Rule
cards.body: Metadata should be legible but quieter than titles.

title: Tag Language Map
description: A metadata card that keeps tags useful for search without turning them into navigation clutter.

cards.label: Purpose
cards.body: Tags describe retrieval language: medium, mood, method, and object type.

cards.label: Boundary
cards.body: Categories and series drive filtering; tags improve discovery through search.

cards.label: Maintenance
cards.body: Prefer fewer stable tags over many near-duplicates.

title: Lexicon Card Anatomy
description: A structural model for cards that can scale from prompt examples to visual knowledge entries.

cards.label: Required
cards.body: Code, title, image, description, category hierarchy, series, and search tags.

cards.label: Optional
cards.body: Links, prompt fragments, references, and related operational notes.

cards.label: Principle
cards.body: Make each card atomic enough to be reused across collections.

title: Series Naming Rule
description: A naming convention for grouping cards into memorable learning sequences.

cards.label: Pattern
cards.body: Use a short prefix, numeric order, and plain-language series name.

cards.label: Example
cards.body: P01 Product Visuals, S01 Shot Grammar, L03 Lexicon Rules.

cards.label: Benefit
cards.body: Readers can scan the library as a system instead of a pile of posts.
